activities_projects.title: Main Characters List
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main characters in the story
steps: Read the lesson carefully
List the characters mentioned in the story
Write one sentence about each character

activities_projects.title: Things Seen on the Way to the Fair
activities_projects.objective: Understand the child’s experiences on the way to the fair
steps: Read the beginning of the lesson
List the things the child notices on the way to the fair
Write 3–4 sentences describing them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands descriptive details in the story

activities_projects.title: Favourite Items at the Fair
activities_projects.objective: Identify the things the child wanted in the fair
steps: Read the fair scene in the lesson
Write the items the child wished to buy
Explain why he wanted them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises key events in the story

activities_projects.title: Child’s Feelings
activities_projects.objective: Understand the emotions of the lost child
steps: Read the part where the child realizes he is lost
Write 4–5 sentences describing his feelings
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands emotions expressed in the story

activities_projects.title: Description of the Fair
activities_projects.objective: Understand the setting of the story
steps: Identify how the fair is described in the story
Write 4–5 lines describing the fair
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the setting of the story

activities_projects.title: Kind Man in the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of the man who helps the child
steps: Read the part where a man lifts the child
Write 3–4 sentences about how he helps the child

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the order of events in the story
steps: Identify four important events in the story
Write them in the correct order

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary from the Lesson
steps: Select five new words from the lesson
Write their meanings
Use them in sentences

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the message of the story
steps: Think about the lesson learned from the story
Write the moral in 3–4 sentences

activities_projects.title: Importance of Parents
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of parents in a child’s life
steps: Think about why the child wanted only his parents
Write 4–5 sentences about the importance of parents
